initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (london_rating.overall_rating - bowery_rating.overall_rating) * 100.0 / bowery_rating.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player_Attributes AS london_rating
JOIN 
    Player ON london_rating.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS bowery_rating
JOIN 
    Player AS bowery_player ON bowery_rating.player_api_id = bowery_player.player_api_id
WHERE 
    Player.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
    AND bowery_player.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
    AND london_rating.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND bowery_rating.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    ((l.overall_rating - j.overall_rating) * 100.0 / j.overall_rating) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player_Attributes l
JOIN 
    Player p1 ON l.player_api_id = p1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes j
JOIN 
    Player p2 ON j.player_api_id = p2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    p1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
    AND p2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
    AND l.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND j.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    (SELECT overall_rating 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') 
    AS landdon_rating,
    (SELECT overall_rating 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') 
    AS bowery_rating,
    CASE 
        WHEN (SELECT overall_rating 
              FROM Player_Attributes pa 
              JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
              WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') = 0 
        THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(
            ((SELECT overall_rating 
              FROM Player_Attributes pa 
              JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
              WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') 
             - (SELECT overall_rating 
                FROM Player_Attributes pa 
                JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
                WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND pa.date = '2013-07-12')) 
            / (SELECT overall_rating 
               FROM Player_Attributes pa 
               JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
               WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') * 100, 2)
    END AS percentage_difference;

SELECT 
    (landon.overall_rating - jordan.overall_rating) * 100.0 / jordan.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player_Attributes landon
JOIN 
    Player p1 ON landon.player_api_id = p1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes jordan ON jordan.player_api_id = (
        SELECT player_api_id 
        FROM Player 
        WHERE player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
    )
WHERE 
    p1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' 
    AND landon.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND jordan.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    (SELECT overall_rating 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') * 100.0 / 
    (SELECT overall_rating 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') - 100 AS percentage_difference

FROM 
    Player_Attributes landon
JOIN

JOIN 
    Player_Attributes jordan ON jordan.player_api_id = (
        SELECT player_api_id 
        FROM Player 
        WHERE player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
    )
WHERE

    AND landon.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND jordan.date = '2013-07-12';

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (l.overall_rating - j.overall_rating) * 100.0 / j.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player l_p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes l ON l_p.player_api_id = l.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player j_p ON j_p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes j ON j_p.player_api_id = j.player_api_id
WHERE 
    l_p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
    AND l.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND j.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    (l.overall_rating - j.overall_rating) * 100.0 / j.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player_Attributes l
JOIN 
    Player p_l ON l.player_api_id = p_l.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes j
JOIN 
    Player p_j ON j.player_api_id = p_j.player_api_id
WHERE 
    p_l.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
    AND p_j.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
    AND l.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND j.date = '2013-07-12';
